allow: Bash(python -c "import mysql.connector; from config import *; c=mysql.connector.connect\(host=STARROCKS_HOST,port=STARROCKS_PORT,user=STARROCKS_USER,password=STARROCKS_PASS,connection_timeout=8\); cur=c.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('SHOW DATABASES'\); print\('DBs:', [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]\); cur.execute\('USE '+STARROCKS_DB\); cur.execute\('SHOW TABLES'\); print\('TABLES:', [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]\); c.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import mysql.connector; from config import *; c=mysql.connector.connect\(host=STARROCKS_HOST,port=STARROCKS_PORT,user=STARROCKS_USER,password=STARROCKS_PASS,connection_timeout=10\); cur=c.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('USE '+STARROCKS_DB\); cur.execute\('SHOW TABLES'\); print\('TABLES:', [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]\); cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM fact_resenas'\); print\('fact_resenas rows:', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\); c.close\(\)")
